raw_consumer_statement: I am filing a complaint against American Express regarding a fraudulent charge of {$7300.00} on my Hilton card ending in XXXX. The charge appeared on XX/XX/year> from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. I did not make this purchase, nor have I authorized anyone else to use my card for any transactions with this merchant. Additionally, I have not received any goods or services related to this charge. On XX/XX/year>, American Express closed its fraud investigation and reapplied the {$7300.00} charge to my account, despite my repeated assertions that the charge was unauthorized. I was provided with a callback number ( XXXX ), but when I called back multiple times on XX/XX/year>, the call went directly to voicemail, and I did not receive any assistance or resolution. I am requesting that American Express credit my account the amount of {$7300.00} to offset the fraudulent charge and correct this error. I have not authorized this charge in any way, and I have made every attempt to resolve this matter with American Express without success.
